subtasks.description: Evaluate whether the current user has permission to update contract terms for vendor TechFlow Solutions. Check access control policies against user role and contract governance rules.
Update the contract record for TechFlow Solutions in the contract management system to extend the term by 12 months. Modify the end_date field accordingly.
Generate and send notification to the procurement team with contract update details (vendor: TechFlow Solutions, extension: 12 months, new term end date).

plan.cost_rationale: Three sequential subtasks required: (1) policy_action (small tier) for permission verification—straightforward access control check against one user and one contract type; (2) multitool_plan (mid tier) to orchestrate the contract update across the enterprise tool registry (likely requires contract management system API call with date calculation); (3) multitool_plan (small tier) for notification routing to procurement team. Dependencies are strict: permissions must pass before update proceeds, update must complete before notification is sent. Tiers reflect task complexity: permission check is simple lookup, update requires tool orchestration and calculation, notification is straightforward delivery.

output.reason: Insufficient context provided: user identity, role, and policy registry details are not specified. Cannot verify authorization to modify contract terms or extend vendor agreement by 12 months without role validation and contract governance approval.
applied_constraints: Requires verified user role with contract modification privileges
Requires procurement/legal approval for term extensions
Audit log entry required for contract amendment

arguments.message: ⚠️ AUTHORIZATION BLOCKED: Contract modification for TechFlow Solutions cannot proceed. Upstream governance check identified pending policy approvals (POL-ACCESS-001, POL-CONTRACT-GOV-001). User authorization and contract governance approval required before contract extension can be executed. Please contact compliance team to complete approval workflow.
